footer.description: Professional Development for Primary Teachers through Content and Language Integrated Learning (CLIL).
home.hero.title: European CLIL Academy
home.hero.subtitle: Professional Development for Primary Teachers through CLIL / teaching through subjects.
home.hero.description: Practical, classroom-ready strategies specifically for primary education, designed by an experienced pedagogical advisor.
home.welcome.title: Welcome to the Academy
home.welcome.desc: We empower primary teachers with practical, classroom-ready CLIL strategies across mathematics, science, arts, music, physical education, history, geography...
home.feat1.title: Expert Pedagogical Advisor
home.feat1.desc: Designed by an expert in primary school contexts, CLIL and teacher training.
home.feat2.title: Classroom-Ready Strategies
home.feat2.desc: Scaffolding techniques, subject-specific vocabulary, and lesson planning in CLIL for young learners.
home.feat3.title: Erasmus+ Support
home.feat3.desc: Complete assistance with certificates, documents, and EU alignment requirements.
home.erasmus.title: Fund Your Training in France
home.erasmus.desc: All our courses are designed to be fully compatible with Erasmus+ mobility funding. We provide full support, including certificates of attendance, application documents, and alignment with EU educational priorities.
home.why.title: Why Choose Us?
home.why.desc: Our academy is built on a foundation of pedagogical expertise and a deep understanding of the primary school environment.
about.header.title: About European CLIL Academy
about.header.subtitle: Empowering primary teachers with innovative CLIL methodologies for the modern European classroom.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc1: European CLIL Academy provides high-quality professional development for primary school teachers who want to implement Content and Language Integrated Learning (CLIL).
about.mission.li1: Strengthen teacher confidence with evidence-based strategies.
about.mission.li2: Provide practical, classroom-ready strategies for immediate implementation.
about.mission.li3: Support meaningful and engaging learning experiences for young learners.
about.alignment.title: Our European Alignment
about.alignment.desc: All our courses are fully compatible with Erasmus+ mobility projects. We provide full assistance with documentation (certificates of attendance, mobility agreements) and guarantee our courses meet European quality standards.
about.trainer.title: Meet the Trainer
about.trainer.subtitle: Our sessions are led by a dedicated pedagogical advisor with deep expertise in primary education.
about.trainer.desc: With a Master's Degree in CLIL and extensive experience training teachers, our facilitator is an expert in primary school contexts and teacher training.
courses.header.title: Our CLIL Courses
courses.header.subtitle: Intensive, practical training courses for European primary school teachers.
courses.detail.title: CLIL in Primary Education – Practical Strategies for the Classroom
courses.detail.desc: This intensive course equips primary teachers (generalists or language specialists) with practical methodologies to teach subjects like Mathematics, Science, Arts, Music, Physical Education, History, Geography... through a foreign language.
courses.outcomes.title: Learning Outcomes
courses.outcomes.li1: Master scaffolding techniques for primary students.
courses.outcomes.li2: Learn to integrate subject-specific vocabulary effectively.
courses.outcomes.li3: Design effective lesson planning and implement micro-teaching.
courses.outcomes.li4: Develop a strong ability for cross-curricular integration.
courses.program.title: Example of Detailed Program
courses.program.day1_desc: Principles & Benefits of CLIL for young learners.
courses.fin.title: Financial & Administrative Information
courses.fin.inc_val: Training, materials, and a Certificate of Attendance.
courses.fin.era_val: Assistance with documentation and meeting quality standards is fully provided.
courses.upcoming.title: Upcoming Sessions
courses.upcoming.subtitle: Join us in Chartres, France for an immersive experience.
courses.upcoming.d1.title: Autumn 2026
courses.upcoming.d2.title: Winter 2027
courses.upcoming.d3.title: Spring 2027
courses.custom.desc: Custom sessions can be arranged for your school or district.
courses.format.title: Flexible Training Formats
courses.format.inperson.title: In-Person in France
courses.format.inperson.desc: Join our intensive 3-5 day courses in Chartres. Perfect for international groups and Erasmus+ participants seeking an immersive experience.
courses.format.onsite.title: On-Site at Your School
courses.format.onsite.desc: We offer tailored training sessions directly in your school or district. Customize the content to match your specific needs and context.
contact.header.title: Contact Us
contact.header.subtitle: Get in touch to discuss courses, register, or arrange custom training for your school.
contact.email.title: Email Us
contact.email.desc: For all inquiries, including registration and custom training requests, please send us an email.
contact.loc.title: Our Location
contact.form.title: Send a Quick Message
contact.form.name: Your Name
